title: Monitor medicinal cannabis production for compliance and quality
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Monitor medicinal cannabis production for compliance and quality demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor and review production processes for compliance with regulatory requirements

pcs.text: Identify and access current legislation, regulations, standards and regulatory body information relevant to licensed cultivators and manufacturers of medicinal cannabis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access current legislation, regulations, standards and regulatory body information relevant to licensed cultivators and manufacturers of medicinal cannabis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access current legislation, regulations, standards and regulatory body information relevant to licensed cultivators and manufacturers of medicinal cannabis.

pcs.text: Identify consequences of non-compliance with legislation, regulations and standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify consequences of non-compliance with legislation, regulations and standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify consequences of non-compliance with legislation, regulations and standards.

pcs.text: Monitor own work practices and those of others to ensure compliance with legislation, regulations and standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor own work practices and those of others to ensure compliance with legislation, regulations and standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor own work practices and those of others to ensure compliance with legislation, regulations and standards.

pcs.text: Review workplace policies and procedures for effectiveness in complying with legislation, regulations and standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review workplace policies and procedures for effectiveness in complying with legislation, regulations and standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review workplace policies and procedures for effectiveness in complying with legislation, regulations and standards.

elements.title: Implement and monitor Good Practices Standards for production of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Establish quality practices and specifications for production of medicinal cannabis

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and determine critical control limits, measures and corrective actions for production processes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and determine critical control limits, measures and corrective actions for production processes.

pcs.text: Contribute to the development of procedures for each identified control limit, measure and corrective action to ensure optimum quality and minimise hazards and risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate responsibilities and instructions for carrying out procedures to staff and contractors.

pcs.text: Provide staff and contractors with training on the quality standards policies and procedures in the area of responsibilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide staff and contractors with training on the quality standards policies and procedures in the area of responsibilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide staff and contractors with training on the quality standards policies and procedures in the area of responsibilities.

pcs.text: Monitor day-to-day operations for effectiveness of quality standards procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor day-to-day operations for effectiveness of quality standards procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor day-to-day operations for effectiveness of quality standards procedures.

pcs.text: Investigate, evaluate and record production deviations as required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate, evaluate and record production deviations as required.
